title: Hornet Removal in Kensington, Brooklyn | $350 - $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Kensington homes and businesses.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Kensington residents, especially in the tree-lined streets near Prospect Park and around the neighborhood's classic brick homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout Kensington, protecting families and pets from aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians eliminate hornet nests quickly and effectively, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Kensington and surrounding Brooklyn neighborhoods for years with specialized hornet removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to remove hornet nests from homes, yards, and commercial properties, ensuring complete elimination and providing preventative advice to keep your property hornet-free.
localContext: Kensington's proximity to Prospect Park and its abundance of mature trees and Victorian-era homes create ideal nesting spots for hornets, particularly in eaves, attics, and covered porches. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes along Ocean Parkway and multi-family buildings near Church Avenue all require vigilant pest control, especially during warmer months when hornet activity peaks.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Kensington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Kensington for most situations. Emergency services are available for nests near high-traffic areas or when residents face immediate danger. Our technicians arrive fully equipped to safely eliminate the nest during the first visit.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of hornet removal in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal pricing between $350-$550 depends on factors including nest size, location accessibility, and height. Ground-level nests or those in easily accessible areas typically cost less, while nests in attics, high eaves, or within wall voids may require additional equipment and labor, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Kensington, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kensington's tree-canopied streets and proximity to Prospect Park create favorable conditions for hornets, particularly bald-faced hornets and European hornets. These insects typically build nests in spring and summer, with activity peaking in late summer and early fall when colonies are largest and most defensive.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians use professional-grade products and protective equipment to safely remove hornet nests while minimizing risk to your family and pets. We recommend keeping people and animals inside during treatment and will provide specific safety instructions based on your property's unique situation.
